1779700.name: Escape Simulator Soundtrack
1779700.description:
Immerse yourself in the atmospheric soundscape of Escape Simulator with the official soundtrack.

Featuring 56 beautifully composed tracks by Saša Dukić, this collection spans over 3 hours of music across MP3 and high-definition WAV formats.

From the ancient sands of Egypt to the quiet halls of a Victorian mansion, and even the mysteries of outer space, this soundtrack creates an immersive audio journey that complements your escape room experience. Perfect for relaxing, focusing, or reliving your favorite escape rooms.

Thank you for supporting the development of our games!
